    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
    <title>ShaktiAI — Career & Financial Independence</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    <style>
    :root{
    --bg:#0d0d0f;--surface:#16161a;--s2:#1e1e24;--s3:#252530;
    --border:#2a2a35;--border2:#35353f;
    --accent:#e8845c;--accent2:#c45fa0;--gold:#d4a843;--green:#5cbf8a;--blue:#5b9cf6;
    --text:#f0ede8;--muted:#8a8490;--muted2:#5a5460;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
    body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
    /* HEADER */
    header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 24px;background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;z-index:100;}
    .logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;}
    .logo-icon{width:34px;height:34px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:17px;}
    .logo-text{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
    .logo-sub{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;}
    .hpills{display:flex;gap:6px;}
    .pill{padding:5px 11px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--s2);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
    .pill.active,.pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(232,132,92,.09);}
    .sdot{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--green);}
    .sdot::before{content:'';width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--green);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
    @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.4}}
    /* LAYOUT */
    .main{display:flex;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
    /* SIDEBAR */
    .sidebar{width:248px;background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:16px 12px;gap:4px;overflow-y:auto;flex-shrink:0;}
    .ssec{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 8px 5px;}
    .nitem{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:9px;font-size:.82rem;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);transition:all .18s;border:1px solid transparent;}
    .nitem:hover{background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);}
    .nitem.active{background:rgba(232,132,92,.1);border-color:rgba(232,132,92,.22);color:var(--accent);}
    .nitem .ni{font-size:.95rem;width:18px;text-align:center;}
    .nbadge{margin-left:auto;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-radius:10px;font-size:.6rem;padding:1px 6px;font-weight:600;}
    .scard{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,132,92,.1),rgba(196,95,160,.1));border:1px solid rgba(232,132,92,.18);border-radius:12px;padding:13px;margin-top:auto;}
    .scard h4{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:9px;}
    .srow{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px;}
    .slabel{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--text);}
    .sval{font-size:.86rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent);}
    /* CONTENT AREA */
    .content{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
    .page{display:none;flex:1;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
    .page.active{display:flex;}
    /* ── CHAT PAGE ─────────────────────── */
    .topicbar{padding:10px 22px;background:var(--s2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .tbadge{padding:4px 11px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;background:rgba(232,132,92,.14);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(232,132,92,.28);}
    .tdesc{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);}
    .messages{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;}
    .messages::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
    .messages::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
    .wbanner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,132,92,.07),rgba(196,95,160,.07));border:1px solid rgba(232,132,92,.15);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;text-align:center;}
    .wbanner h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:7px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
    .wbanner p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.6;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto 16px;}
    .chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;justify-content:center;}
    .chip{padding:6px 13px;border-radius:18px;font-size:.76rem;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;transition:all .18s;}
    .chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
    .msg{display:flex;gap:11px;align-items:flex-start;animation:fup .28s ease;}
    @keyframes fup{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    .msg.user{flex-direction:row-reverse;}
    .av{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:10px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:15px;}
    .av.ai{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));}
    .av.ua{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);}
    .bubble{max-width:76%;padding:12px 15px;border-radius:14px;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.65;}
    .msg.user .bubble{background:rgba(232,132,92,.11);border:1px solid rgba(232,132,92,.18);border-top-right-radius:3px;}
    .msg.ai .bubble{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top-left-radius:3px;}
    .bubble strong{color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;}
    .bubble ul,.bubble ol{margin:7px 0 0 17px;}
    .bubble li{margin-bottom:3px;}
    .typing{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center;padding:12px 15px;}
    .typing span{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--muted);border-radius:50%;animation:bounce 1.2s infinite;}
    .typing span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s;}
    .typing span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s;}
    @keyframes bounce{0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}30%{transform:translateY(-5px)}}
    .inputarea{padding:14px 22px 18px;background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
    .irow{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-end;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:9px 12px;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .irow:focus-within{border-color:rgba(232,132,92,.45);}
    #userInput{flex:1;background:none;border:none;outline:none;color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.86rem;resize:none;max-height:110px;line-height:1.5;}
    #userInput::placeholder{color:var(--muted);}
    .sbtn{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:9px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));border:none;color:#fff;font-size:.95rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:opacity .2s,transform .1s;}
    .sbtn:hover{opacity:.87;transform:scale(1.04);}
    .ihints{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-top:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .hchip{font-size:.7rem;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
    .hchip:hover{color:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
    /* ── FINANCE PLANNER ───────────────── */
    .ppage{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:28px;}
    .ppage::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
    .ppage::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
    .ptitle{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .psub{color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:24px;}
    .cards-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:24px;}
    .kcard{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px;}
    .kcard .kval{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
    .kcard .klbl{font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;}
    .kcard.accent .kval{color:var(--accent);}
    .kcard.gold .kval{color:var(--gold);}
    .kcard.green .kval{color:var(--green);}
    .kcard.blue .kval{color:var(--blue);}
    .section-block{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .section-block h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
    .input-row-fp{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .fp-group{flex:1;min-width:140px;}
    .fp-group label{display:block;font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:5px;}
    .fp-group input,.fp-group select{width:100%;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 12px;color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.84rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .fp-group input:focus,.fp-group select:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
    .fp-group select option{background:var(--s2);}
    .calc-btn{padding:9px 20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));border:none;border-radius:9px;color:#fff;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.84rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .2s;}
    .calc-btn:hover{opacity:.88;}
    .result-box{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-top:12px;}
    .result-box .rval{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:3px;}
    .result-box .rlbl{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);}
    .progress-bar-fp{height:8px;background:var(--border);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px;}
    .progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));transition:width .6s ease;}
    .sch-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.84rem;}
    .sch-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
    .sch-tag{padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;}
    .tag-invest{background:rgba(91,156,246,.15);color:var(--blue);}
    .tag-save{background:rgba(92,191,138,.15);color:var(--green);}
    .tag-scheme{background:rgba(212,168,67,.15);color:var(--gold);}
    /* ── CAREER ROADMAP ───────────────── */
    .roadmap-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .rm-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
    .rm-card:hover,.rm-card.selected{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(232,132,92,.05);}
    .rm-card h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px;}
    .rm-card p{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}
    .rm-steps{counter-reset:step;}
    .rm-step{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px;align-items:flex-start;}
    .rm-step-num{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;color:#fff;}
    .rm-step-content h4{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;}
    .rm-step-content p{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}
    .rm-step-content .tags{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:5px;}
    .rm-step-content .tags span{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-size:.68rem;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);}
    .salary-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.82rem;}
    .salary-table th{text-align:left;padding:9px 12px;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
    .salary-table td{padding:9px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
    .salary-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
    .salary-table .grow{color:var(--green);font-weight:600;}
    /* ── RESUME BUILDER ───────────────── */
    .resume-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;height:100%;overflow:hidden;}
    .resume-form{overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}
    .resume-form::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
    .resume-form::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);}
    .resume-preview{background:var(--s2);border-left:1px solid var(--border);overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}
    .resume-preview::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
    .rform-sec{margin-bottom:20px;}
    .rform-sec h3{font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;}
    .rform-field{margin-bottom:10px;}
    .rform-field label{display:block;font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;}
    .rform-field input,.rform-field textarea{width:100%;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 11px;color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;outline:none;}
    .rform-field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:70px;}
    .rform-field input:focus,.rform-field textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
    .resume-doc{background:#fff;color:#222;border-radius:10px;padding:28px;min-height:500px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;}
    .rdoc-name{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#1a1a2e;margin-bottom:2px;}
    .rdoc-contact{font-size:11px;color:#666;margin-bottom:14px;}
    .rdoc-section h3{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--accent);border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--accent);padding-bottom:3px;margin-bottom:9px;margin-top:16px;}
    .rdoc-section p,.rdoc-section li{font-size:12px;color:#333;line-height:1.6;}
    .rdoc-section ul{margin-left:16px;}
    .rdoc-job-title{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;}
    .rdoc-job-meta{font-size:11px;color:#888;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .resume-tips{margin-top:14px;}
    .tip-item{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;padding:8px;background:rgba(232,132,92,.07);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:7px;font-size:.78rem;}
    /* ── MENTORSHIP ───────────────────── */
    .mentor-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(230px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px;}
    .mentor-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;transition:all .2s;}
    .mentor-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
    .mentor-av{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .mentor-name{font-size:.92rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
    .mentor-role{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px;}
    .mentor-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .mentor-tag{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-size:.68rem;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);}
    .mentor-btn{width:100%;padding:8px;background:rgba(232,132,92,.1);border:1px solid rgba(232,132,92,.25);border-radius:8px;color:var(--accent);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;}
    .mentor-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
    .session-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:11px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
    .sess-info h4{font-size:.86rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
    .sess-info p{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);}
    .sess-badge{padding:4px 10px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;}
    .sess-upcoming{background:rgba(91,156,246,.15);color:var(--blue);}
    .sess-done{background:rgba(92,191,138,.15);color:var(--green);}
    /* ── GOVT SCHEMES ─────────────────── */
    .scheme-filter{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .sfilter{padding:6px 13px;border-radius:18px;font-size:.76rem;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--s2);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .18s;}
    .sfilter.active{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(232,132,92,.09);}
    .scheme-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:14px;transition:all .2s;}
    .scheme-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
    .scheme-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .scheme-title{font-size:.94rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;}
    .scheme-org{font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);}
    .scheme-badge{padding:4px 10px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;white-space:nowrap;}
    .sb-loan{background:rgba(212,168,67,.15);color:var(--gold);}
    .sb-skill{background:rgba(91,156,246,.15);color:var(--blue);}
    .sb-health{background:rgba(92,191,138,.15);color:var(--green);}
    .sb-biz{background:rgba(196,95,160,.15);color:var(--accent2);}
    .scheme-desc{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .scheme-details{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .sd-item{display:flex;gap:5px;align-items:center;font-size:.76rem;}
    .sd-item .sdl{color:var(--muted);}
    .sd-item .sdv{font-weight:600;color:var(--text);}
    .scheme-apply{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;}
    .apply-btn{padding:7px 15px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all .2s;}
    .apply-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#fff;}
    .apply-secondary{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);}
    .apply-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
    /* SHARED */
    .page-inner{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:26px;}
    .page-inner::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
    .page-inner::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
    .pgheader{margin-bottom:22px;}
    .pgheader h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.45rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .pgheader p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.83rem;}
    .toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;background:var(--green);color:#fff;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;z-index:999;animation:toastin .3s ease;display:none;}
    @keyframes toastin{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    @media(max-width:700px){.sidebar{display:none;}.roadmap-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.resume-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <header>
    <div class="logo" onclick="showPage('chat')">
    <div class="logo-icon">🌸</div>
    <div>
    <div class="logo-text">ShaktiAI</div>
    <div class="logo-sub">Career & Financial Independence</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hpills">
    <div class="pill active" id="mp-career" onclick="setMode('career')">💼 Career</div>
    <div class="pill" id="mp-finance" onclick="setMode('finance')">💰 Finance</div>
    <div class="pill" id="mp-legal" onclick="setMode('legal')">⚖️ Rights</div>
    <div class="pill" id="mp-skills" onclick="setMode('skills')">📚 Skills</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sdot">ShaktiAI Online</div>
    </header>
    <div class="main">
    <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="ssec">Navigation</div>
    <div class="nitem active" onclick="showPage('chat',this)"><span class="ni">💬</span> AI Assistant</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('finance',this)"><span class="ni">📊</span> Financial Planner <span class="nbadge">Live</span></div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('career',this)"><span class="ni">🎯</span> Career Roadmap</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('resume',this)"><span class="ni">📝</span> Resume Builder</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('mentor',this)"><span class="ni">🤝</span> Mentorship Network</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('schemes',this)"><span class="ni">🏛️</span> Govt. Schemes</div>
    <div class="ssec">Recent Chats</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('chat',this);sendQuick('How do I negotiate a salary hike?')"><span class="ni">🕐</span> Salary negotiation</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('chat',this);sendQuick('SIP investment basics for beginners')"><span class="ni">🕐</span> SIP basics</div>
    <div class="nitem" onclick="showPage('chat',this);sendQuick('What are my maternity leave rights in India?')"><span class="ni">🕐</span> Maternity rights</div>
    <div class="scard">
    <h4>Your Progress</h4>
    <div class="srow"><span class="slabel">Sessions</span><span class="sval">12</span></div>
    <div class="srow"><span class="slabel">Goals Set</span><span class="sval">4</span></div>
    <div class="srow"><span class="slabel">Resources Saved</span><span class="sval">7</span></div>
    </div>
    </aside>
    <div class="content">
    <!-- ══ PAGE: CHAT ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="page active" id="page-chat">
    <div class="topicbar">
    <div class="tbadge" id="topicBadge">💼 Career Mode</div>
    <div class="tdesc" id="topicDesc">Ask about jobs, salary, upskilling, career pivots & more</div>
    </div>
    <div class="messages" id="messages">
    <div class="wbanner">
    <h2>Namaste! I'm ShaktiAI 🌸</h2>
    <p>Your personal AI companion for career growth and financial independence. What would you like to explore today?</p>
    <div class="chips">
    <div class="chip" onclick="sendQuick('How do I ask for a salary hike?')">💸 Salary Hike Tips</div>
    <div class="chip" onclick="sendQuick('How should I start investing with ₹5000/month?')">📈 Start Investing</div>
    <div class="chip" onclick="sendQuick('What government schemes exist for women entrepreneurs?')">🏛️ Govt Schemes</div>
    <div class="chip" onclick="sendQuick('How do I plan a career change at 35?')">🔄 Career Change</div>
    <div class="chip" onclick="sendQuick('What are my maternity leave rights in India?')">⚖️ Legal Rights</div>
    <div class="chip" onclick="sendQuick('How to build an emergency fund?')">🛡️ Emergency Fund</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="inputarea">
    <div class="irow">
    <textarea id="userInput" rows="1" placeholder="Ask about careers, salary, investing, rights, schemes…" onkeydown="handleKey(event)" oninput="autoResize(this)"></textarea>
    <button class="sbtn" onclick="sendMessage()">➤</button>
    </div>
    <div class="ihints">
    <div class="hchip" onclick="insertHint('Freelancing tips for women in India')">Freelancing</div>
    <div class="hchip" onclick="insertHint('How to negotiate a promotion?')">Promotion</div>
    <div class="hchip" onclick="insertHint('SIP vs PPF comparison')">SIP vs PPF</div>
    <div class="hchip" onclick="insertHint('Best free online courses for women')">Free Courses</div>
    <div class="hchip" onclick="insertHint('How to start a small business from home?')">Home Business</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ══ PAGE: FINANCE PLANNER ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="page" id="page-finance">
    <div class="page-inner">
    <div class="pgheader">
    <h2>📊 Financial Planner</h2>
    <p>Calculate your SIP returns, build a budget, and plan your financial independence</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cards-row">
    <div class="kcard accent"><div class="kval" id="fp-monthly-save">₹0</div><div class="klbl">Monthly Savings</div></div>
    <div class="kcard gold"><div class="kval" id="fp-sip-return">₹0</div><div class="klbl">10yr SIP Value</div></div>
    <div class="kcard green"><div class="kval" id="fp-emergency">₹0</div><div class="klbl">Emergency Fund</div></div>
    <div class="kcard blue"><div class="kval" id="fp-fi-age">--</div><div class="klbl">FI Age (est.)</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block">
    <h3>💰 Income & Expenses</h3>
    <div class="input-row-fp">
    <div class="fp-group"><label>Monthly Income (₹)</label><input type="number" id="fp-income" placeholder="50000" oninput="calcFinance()"/></div>
    <div class="fp-group"><label>Monthly Expenses (₹)</label><input type="number" id="fp-expenses" placeholder="35000" oninput="calcFinance()"/></div>
    <div class="fp-group"><label>Current Age</label><input type="number" id="fp-age" placeholder="28" oninput="calcFinance()"/></div>
    </div>
    <div id="budget-breakdown"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block">
    <h3>📈 SIP Calculator</h3>
    <div class="input-row-fp">
    <div class="fp-group"><label>Monthly SIP Amount (₹)</label><input type="number" id="sip-amount" placeholder="5000" oninput="calcSIP()"/></div>
    <div class="fp-group"><label>Expected Return (%/yr)</label><input type="number" id="sip-rate" placeholder="12" oninput="calcSIP()"/></div>
    <div class="fp-group"><label>Duration (Years)</label><input type="number" id="sip-years" placeholder="10" oninput="calcSIP()"/></div>
    </div>
    <div id="sip-result"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block">
    <h3>🏛️ Recommended Action Plan</h3>
    <div id="action-plan">
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Enter your income & expenses above to get a personalised plan</span><span class="sch-tag tag-invest">Pending</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ══ PAGE: CAREER ROADMAP ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="page" id="page-career">
    <div class="page-inner">
    <div class="pgheader">
    <h2>🎯 Career Roadmap</h2>
    <p>Choose your path and get a personalised step-by-step career growth plan</p>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block" style="margin-bottom:18px">
    <h3>Choose Your Career Stage</h3>
    <div class="roadmap-grid" id="roadmap-cards">
    <div class="rm-card" onclick="selectRoadmap('fresher',this)"><h4>🎓 Fresh Graduate</h4><p>Just starting out, looking for first job or internship</p></div>
    <div class="rm-card" onclick="selectRoadmap('mid',this)"><h4>💼 Mid-Career (2–8 yrs)</h4><p>Working professional wanting growth or higher salary</p></div>
    <div class="rm-card" onclick="selectRoadmap('returner',this)"><h4>🏠 Career Returner</h4><p>Returning after a gap (maternity, family, health)</p></div>
    <div class="rm-card" onclick="selectRoadmap('pivot',this)"><h4>🔄 Career Pivoter</h4><p>Switching industries or roles completely</p></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block" id="roadmap-steps" style="display:none">
    <h3 id="roadmap-title">Your Roadmap</h3>
    <div id="roadmap-content"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block">
    <h3>💰 Salary Benchmarks by Industry</h3>
    <table class="salary-table">
    <thead><tr><th>Role</th><th>Entry (₹/yr)</th><th>Mid (₹/yr)</th><th>Senior (₹/yr)</th><th>Growth</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
    <tr><td>Software Engineer</td><td>4–7L</td><td>12–22L</td><td>25–50L</td><td class="grow">↑ High</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Data Analyst</td><td>3–6L</td><td>8–16L</td><td>18–35L</td><td class="grow">↑ High</td></tr>
    <tr><td>HR Manager</td><td>3–5L</td><td>7–14L</td><td>15–28L</td><td class="grow">↑ Medium</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Marketing Manager</td><td>3–5L</td><td>8–18L</td><td>20–40L</td><td class="grow">↑ High</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Financial Analyst</td><td>4–7L</td><td>10–20L</td><td>22–45L</td><td class="grow">↑ High</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Teacher / Educator</td><td>2–4L</td><td>5–10L</td><td>10–18L</td><td style="color:var(--muted)">→ Stable</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Freelancer / Consultant</td><td>2–5L</td><td>8–20L</td><td>20–60L+</td><td class="grow">↑ Variable</td></tr>
    </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ══ PAGE: RESUME BUILDER ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="page" id="page-resume">
    <div class="resume-layout">
    <div class="resume-form">
    <div class="pgheader"><h2>📝 Resume Builder</h2><p>Fill in your details — preview updates live</p></div>
    <div class="rform-sec">
    <h3>Personal Info</h3>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Full Name</label><input id="r-name" placeholder="Priya Sharma" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Job Title / Tagline</label><input id="r-title" placeholder="Software Engineer | Python & Data" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Email & Phone</label><input id="r-contact" placeholder="priya@email.com | +91 98765 43210" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Location</label><input id="r-location" placeholder="Bangalore, India" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>LinkedIn / Portfolio</label><input id="r-links" placeholder="linkedin.com/in/priyasharma" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rform-sec">
    <h3>Professional Summary</h3>
    <div class="rform-field"><textarea id="r-summary" placeholder="Experienced software engineer with 4+ years building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean code and mentoring junior developers. Seeking senior role in product-driven teams." oninput="updateResume()"></textarea></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rform-sec">
    <h3>Work Experience</h3>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Job Title & Company</label><input id="r-job1-title" placeholder="Senior Developer — TechCorp India" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Duration</label><input id="r-job1-dates" placeholder="Jan 2021 – Present" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Key Achievements (one per line)</label><textarea id="r-job1-bullets" placeholder="Led migration of monolith to microservices, reducing load time by 40%&#10;Mentored team of 5 junior developers&#10;Implemented CI/CD pipeline cutting deployment time by 60%" oninput="updateResume()"></textarea></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rform-sec">
    <h3>Education</h3>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Degree & Institution</label><input id="r-edu" placeholder="B.Tech Computer Science — IIT Delhi, 2019" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rform-sec">
    <h3>Skills</h3>
    <div class="rform-field"><label>Comma-separated skills</label><input id="r-skills" placeholder="Python, JavaScript, React, SQL, AWS, Leadership" oninput="updateResume()"/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="resume-tips">
    <div class="tip-item">💡 <span>Use numbers to quantify achievements — "increased sales by 30%" beats "improved sales"</span></div>
    <div class="tip-item">💡 <span>Address career gaps positively: "Managed family responsibilities while completing online certification in..."</span></div>
    <div class="tip-item">💡 <span>Tailor your summary to each job description — use keywords from the job posting</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="resume-preview">
    <div class="resume-doc" id="resume-doc">
    <div class="rdoc-name">Your Name</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:#555;margin-bottom:4px;">Your Title</div>
    <div class="rdoc-contact">email@example.com | +91 XXXXX XXXXX | City, India</div>
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Summary</h3><p>Your professional summary will appear here…</p></div>
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Experience</h3><p style="color:#aaa">Fill in the form to see your resume</p></div>
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Education</h3><p>Your education details</p></div>
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Skills</h3><p>Your skills</p></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ══ PAGE: MENTORSHIP ════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="page" id="page-mentor">
    <div class="page-inner">
    <div class="pgheader"><h2>🤝 Mentorship Network</h2><p>Connect with women leaders who've been where you are</p></div>
    <div class="section-block" style="margin-bottom:18px">
    <h3>Upcoming Sessions</h3>
    <div class="session-card"><div class="sess-info"><h4>Salary Negotiation Masterclass</h4><p>Anita Rao, VP Engineering — Google India &nbsp;|&nbsp; Mar 20, 6 PM</p></div><span class="sess-badge sess-upcoming">Upcoming</span></div>
    <div class="session-card"><div class="sess-info"><h4>Returning to Work After a Break</h4><p>Deepa Krishnan, Director HR — Infosys &nbsp;|&nbsp; Mar 18, 7 PM</p></div><span class="sess-badge sess-upcoming">Tomorrow</span></div>
    <div class="session-card"><div class="sess-info"><h4>Building Your Personal Brand on LinkedIn</h4><p>Meera Joshi, Founder — CareerHer &nbsp;|&nbsp; Mar 15, 6 PM</p></div><span class="sess-badge sess-done">Completed</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-block">
    <h3>Find a Mentor</h3>
    <div class="mentor-grid">
    <div class="mentor-card"><div class="mentor-av">👩‍💻</div><div class="mentor-name">Sneha Agarwal</div><div class="mentor-role">Senior Data Scientist, Amazon</div><div class="mentor-tags"><span class="mentor-tag">Data Science</span><span class="mentor-tag">AI/ML</span><span class="mentor-tag">Career Growth</span></div><button class="mentor-btn" onclick="bookMentor('Sneha Agarwal')">Request Session</button></div>
    <div class="mentor-card"><div class="mentor-av">👩‍💼</div><div class="mentor-name">Radha Menon</div><div class="mentor-role">CFO, Fintech Startup</div><div class="mentor-tags"><span class="mentor-tag">Finance</span><span class="mentor-tag">Leadership</span><span class="mentor-tag">Startups</span></div><button class="mentor-btn" onclick="bookMentor('Radha Menon')">Request Session</button></div>
    <div class="mentor-card"><div class="mentor-av">👩‍🏫</div><div class="mentor-name">Kavitha Rao</div><div class="mentor-role">Entrepreneur, EdTech Founder</div><div class="mentor-tags"><span class="mentor-tag">Entrepreneurship</span><span class="mentor-tag">EdTech</span><span class="mentor-tag">Fundraising</span></div><button class="mentor-btn" onclick="bookMentor('Kavitha Rao')">Request Session</button></div>
    <div class="mentor-card"><div class="mentor-av">👩‍⚕️</div><div class="mentor-name">Dr. Priya Nair</div><div class="mentor-role">Director, Healthcare NGO</div><div class="mentor-tags"><span class="mentor-tag">NGO</span><span class="mentor-tag">Healthcare</span><span class="mentor-tag">Social Impact</span></div><button class="mentor-btn" onclick="bookMentor('Dr. Priya Nair')">Request Session</button></div>
    <div class="mentor-card"><div class="mentor-av">👩‍🎨</div><div class="mentor-name">Ananya Singh</div><div class="mentor-role">Creative Director, JWT India</div><div class="mentor-tags"><span class="mentor-tag">Design</span><span class="mentor-tag">Marketing</span><span class="mentor-tag">Branding</span></div><button class="mentor-btn" onclick="bookMentor('Ananya Singh')">Request Session</button></div>
    <div class="mentor-card"><div class="mentor-av">👩‍🔬</div><div class="mentor-name">Sunita Patel</div><div class="mentor-role">Research Scientist, DRDO</div><div class="mentor-tags"><span class="mentor-tag">Research</span><span class="mentor-tag">STEM</span><span class="mentor-tag">Govt Jobs</span></div><button class="mentor-btn" onclick="bookMentor('Sunita Patel')">Request Session</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ══ PAGE: GOVT SCHEMES ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="page" id="page-schemes">
    <div class="page-inner">
    <div class="pgheader"><h2>🏛️ Government Schemes for Women</h2><p>Discover loans, training, and benefits you're entitled to</p></div>
    <div class="scheme-filter">
    <div class="sfilter active" onclick="filterScheme('all',this)">All Schemes</div>
    <div class="sfilter" onclick="filterScheme('loan',this)">💰 Loans</div>
    <div class="sfilter" onclick="filterScheme('skill',this)">📚 Skill Training</div>
    <div class="sfilter" onclick="filterScheme('biz',this)">🚀 Business</div>
    <div class="sfilter" onclick="filterScheme('health',this)">🏥 Health</div>
    </div>
    <div id="schemes-list">
    <div class="scheme-card" data-cat="loan biz">
    <div class="scheme-header"><div><div class="scheme-title">Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)</div><div class="scheme-org">Ministry of Finance, Govt of India</div></div><span class="scheme-badge sb-loan">Loan</span></div>
    <div class="scheme-desc">Collateral-free loans for small business owners. Three categories — Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,000–5L), and Tarun (₹5–10L). Ideal for women starting home-based or micro businesses.</div>
    <div class="scheme-details"><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Loan:</span><span class="sdv">Up to ₹10 Lakh</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Collateral:</span><span class="sdv">None</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Bank:</span><span class="sdv">Any scheduled bank</span></div></div>
    <div class="scheme-apply"><button class="apply-btn apply-primary" onclick="showToast('Redirecting to mudra.org.in...')">Apply Now</button><button class="apply-btn apply-secondary" onclick="showToast('Details copied!')">Learn More</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scheme-card" data-cat="loan biz">
    <div class="scheme-header"><div><div class="scheme-title">Mahila Udyam Nidhi Scheme</div><div class="scheme-org">Punjab National Bank / SIDBI</div></div><span class="scheme-badge sb-loan">Loan</span></div>
    <div class="scheme-desc">Loans up to ₹10 lakh for women entrepreneurs to set up or modernise small-scale industries. Soft terms, low interest rates, and relaxed repayment schedules specifically for women.</div>
    <div class="scheme-details"><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Loan:</span><span class="sdv">Up to ₹10 Lakh</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Interest:</span><span class="sdv">Subsidised rate</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">For:</span><span class="sdv">Women entrepreneurs</span></div></div>
    <div class="scheme-apply"><button class="apply-btn apply-primary" onclick="showToast('Opening PNB portal...')">Apply Now</button><button class="apply-btn apply-secondary">Learn More</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scheme-card" data-cat="biz loan">
    <div class="scheme-header"><div><div class="scheme-title">Stand Up India</div><div class="scheme-org">SIDBI / Ministry of Finance</div></div><span class="scheme-badge sb-biz">Business</span></div>
    <div class="scheme-desc">Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services or trading sector.</div>
    <div class="scheme-details"><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Loan:</span><span class="sdv">₹10L – ₹1 Crore</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Eligibility:</span><span class="sdv">Women / SC/ST</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Type:</span><span class="sdv">Greenfield project</span></div></div>
    <div class="scheme-apply"><button class="apply-btn apply-primary" onclick="showToast('Opening standupmitra.in...')">Apply Now</button><button class="apply-btn apply-secondary">Learn More</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scheme-card" data-cat="skill">
    <div class="scheme-header"><div><div class="scheme-title">PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)</div><div class="scheme-org">Ministry of Skill Development, Govt of India</div></div><span class="scheme-badge sb-skill">Skill Training</span></div>
    <div class="scheme-desc">Free short-term skill training in 300+ job roles. Certification recognised nationally. Training centres across India with special focus on women and youth. Get a ₹8,000 reward on certification.</div>
    <div class="scheme-details"><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Cost:</span><span class="sdv">Free</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Reward:</span><span class="sdv">₹8,000 on pass</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Courses:</span><span class="sdv">300+ skill areas</span></div></div>
    <div class="scheme-apply"><button class="apply-btn apply-primary" onclick="showToast('Opening pmkvyofficial.org...')">Enroll Now</button><button class="apply-btn apply-secondary">Find Centre</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scheme-card" data-cat="skill">
    <div class="scheme-header"><div><div class="scheme-title">Nai Roshni — Leadership for Minority Women</div><div class="scheme-org">Ministry of Minority Affairs</div></div><span class="scheme-badge sb-skill">Skill Training</span></div>
    <div class="scheme-desc">Leadership development training for minority women to empower them to interact with government systems. Covers health, education, sanitation, and financial literacy. Free residential camps across India.</div>
    <div class="scheme-details"><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Cost:</span><span class="sdv">Free</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Duration:</span><span class="sdv">3–6 days</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Focus:</span><span class="sdv">Leadership & Literacy</span></div></div>
    <div class="scheme-apply"><button class="apply-btn apply-primary" onclick="showToast('Opening minority affairs portal...')">Apply Now</button><button class="apply-btn apply-secondary">Learn More</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scheme-card" data-cat="health">
    <div class="scheme-header"><div><div class="scheme-title">Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)</div><div class="scheme-org">Ministry of Health & Family Welfare</div></div><span class="scheme-badge sb-health">Health</span></div>
    <div class="scheme-desc">Cash assistance to pregnant women for institutional delivery to reduce maternal and neonatal mortality. ₹1,400 in rural areas, ₹1,000 in urban areas. Available through ANM / ASHA workers in all states.</div>
    <div class="scheme-details"><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Benefit:</span><span class="sdv">₹1,000–₹1,400</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">For:</span><span class="sdv">Pregnant women</span></div><div class="sd-item"><span class="sdl">Through:</span><span class="sdv">ASHA / ANM worker</span></div></div>
    <div class="scheme-apply"><button class="apply-btn apply-primary" onclick="showToast('Contact your local ASHA worker or PHC')">How to Claim</button><button class="apply-btn apply-secondary">Learn More</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div><!-- /content -->
    </div><!-- /main -->
    <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
    <script>
    // ── AI CHAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const SYSTEM = `You are ShaktiAI, a warm, empowering AI assistant helping women across India achieve career growth and financial independence. Be knowledgeable, encouraging, and practical.
    Help with: career advice, salary negotiation, promotions, career pivots, financial planning (SIP/PPF/mutual funds/budgeting), government schemes (Mudra, Mahila Udyam Nidhi, Stand Up India), legal rights (POSH Act, 26-week maternity leave, Equal Pay), skill development, freelancing, entrepreneurship.
    Always use Indian context (₹, Indian laws, Indian platforms like Zerodha/Groww/Naukri). Be concise, specific, actionable. Use bullet points when helpful. End with encouragement or a follow-up question.`;
    let mode = 'career';
    let history = [];
    const modeData = {
    career:{badge:'💼 Career Mode',desc:'Ask about jobs, salary, upskilling, career pivots & more'},
    finance:{badge:'💰 Finance Mode',desc:'Budgeting, SIPs, loans, emergency funds & financial planning'},
    legal:{badge:'⚖️ Rights Mode',desc:'Workplace rights, maternity leave, POSH Act & protections'},
    skills:{badge:'📚 Skills Mode',desc:'Free courses, certifications, freelancing & entrepreneurship'}
    };
    function setMode(m) {
    mode = m;
    document.getElementById('topicBadge').textContent = modeData[m].badge;
    document.getElementById('topicDesc').textContent = modeData[m].desc;
    ['career','finance','legal','skills'].forEach(k => {
    document.getElementById('mp-'+k).classList.toggle('active', k===m);
    });
    }
    function autoResize(el) { el.style.height='auto'; el.style.height=Math.min(el.scrollHeight,110)+'px'; }
    function handleKey(e) { if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();sendMessage();} }
    function insertHint(t) { document.getElementById('userInput').value=t; document.getElementById('userInput').focus(); }
    function sendQuick(t) { showPage('chat'); insertHint(t); sendMessage(); }
    function addMsg(role, html) {
    const msgs = document.getElementById('messages');
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'msg ' + (role==='user'?'user':'ai');
    d.innerHTML = `<div class="av ${role==='user'?'ua':'ai'}">${role==='user'?'👤':'🌸'}</div><div class="bubble">${html}</div>`;
    msgs.appendChild(d);
    msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;
    }
    function showTyping() {
    const msgs = document.getElementById('messages');
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className='msg ai'; d.id='typ';
    d.innerHTML='<div class="av ai">🌸</div><div class="bubble"><div class="typing"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div></div>';
    msgs.appendChild(d); msgs.scrollTop=msgs.scrollHeight;
    }
    function fmt(text) {
    text = text.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>');
    text = text.replace(/^[-•*]\s+(.+)$/gm,'<li>$1</li>');
    text = text.replace(/(<li>.*<\/li>\n?)+/g, m=>'<ul>'+m+'</ul>');
    text = text.replace(/^\d+\.\s+(.+)$/gm,'<li>$1</li>');
    text = text.replace(/\n\n/g,'<br><br>').replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
    return text;
    }
    async function sendMessage() {
    const input = document.getElementById('userInput');
    const text = input.value.trim();
    if(!text) return;
    input.value=''; input.style.height='auto';
    const banner = document.querySelector('.wbanner');
    if(banner) banner.remove();
    addMsg('user', text);
    history.push({role:'user',content:text});
    showTyping();
    try {
    const res = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
    body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:1000,
    system:SYSTEM+'\n\nCurrent mode: '+mode+'.',messages:history})
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    const el = document.getElementById('typ'); if(el) el.remove();
    const reply = data.content?.[0]?.text || 'Sorry, I could not process that. Please try again.';
    history.push({role:'assistant',content:reply});
    addMsg('ai', fmt(reply));
    } catch(e) {
    const el = document.getElementById('typ'); if(el) el.remove();
    addMsg('ai','⚠️ Connection issue. Please check your connection and try again.');
    }
    }
    // ── PAGE NAVIGATION ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function showPage(id, navEl) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('page-'+id).classList.add('active');
    if(navEl) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.nitem').forEach(n=>n.classList.remove('active'));
    navEl.classList.add('active');
    }
    }
    // ── FINANCE PLANNER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function fmtINR(n) { return '₹'+Math.round(n).toLocaleString('en-IN'); }
    function calcFinance() {
    const income = parseFloat(document.getElementById('fp-income').value)||0;
    const expenses = parseFloat(document.getElementById('fp-expenses').value)||0;
    const age = parseFloat(document.getElementById('fp-age').value)||28;
    const savings = income - expenses;
    const emergency = expenses * 6;
    const fiAge = savings>0 ? Math.round(age + (income*300)/(savings*12)) : '--';
    document.getElementById('fp-monthly-save').textContent = savings>0 ? fmtINR(savings) : '₹0';
    document.getElementById('fp-emergency').textContent = emergency>0 ? fmtINR(emergency) : '₹0';
    document.getElementById('fp-fi-age').textContent = fiAge;
    // SIP auto-fill
    if(savings>0) {
    const sipAmt = Math.round(savings*0.3);
    if(!document.getElementById('sip-amount').value) document.getElementById('sip-amount').value = sipAmt;
    if(!document.getElementById('sip-rate').value) document.getElementById('sip-rate').value = 12;
    if(!document.getElementById('sip-years').value) document.getElementById('sip-years').value = 10;
    calcSIP();
    }
    if(income>0) {
    const savePct = Math.round((savings/income)*100);
    document.getElementById('budget-breakdown').innerHTML = `
    <div class="result-box">
    <div class="rval">${savePct}% Savings Rate</div>
    <div class="rlbl">You save ${fmtINR(savings)}/month from ${fmtINR(income)} income</div>
    <div class="progress-bar-fp" style="margin-top:10px"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${Math.min(savePct,100)}%"></div></div>
    <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px">${savePct<10?'⚠️ Try to save at least 20% of income':savePct<20?'📈 Good start — aim for 30%':'✅ Excellent savings rate!'}</div>
    </div>`;
    buildActionPlan(income, savings, emergency);
    }
    }
    function calcSIP() {
    const P = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sip-amount').value)||0;
    const r = (parseFloat(document.getElementById('sip-rate').value)||12)/100/12;
    const n = (parseFloat(document.getElementById('sip-years').value)||10)*12;
    if(P===0) return;
    const fv = P * (((Math.pow(1+r,n)-1)/r)*(1+r));
    const invested = P*n;
    const gain = fv - invested;
    document.getElementById('fp-sip-return').textContent = fmtINR(fv);
    document.getElementById('sip-result').innerHTML = `
    <div class="result-box">
    <div class="rval">${fmtINR(fv)}</div>
    <div class="rlbl">Estimated corpus after ${document.getElementById('sip-years').value||10} years</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:20px;margin-top:10px">
    <div><div style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">Invested</div><div style="font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">${fmtINR(invested)}</div></div>
    <div><div style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">Gains</div><div style="font-weight:600;color:var(--green)">${fmtINR(gain)}</div></div>
    <div><div style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">Return</div><div style="font-weight:600;color:var(--accent)">${Math.round((gain/invested)*100)}%</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>`;
    }
    function buildActionPlan(income, savings, emergency) {
    const sipAmt = Math.round(savings*0.3);
    const ppfAmt = Math.min(Math.round(savings*0.15), 12500);
    document.getElementById('action-plan').innerHTML = `
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Invest ${fmtINR(sipAmt)}/month in ELSS SIP (tax-saving + growth)</span><span class="sch-tag tag-invest">Invest</span></div>
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Contribute ${fmtINR(ppfAmt)}/month to PPF (₹1.5L/yr limit, tax-free)</span><span class="sch-tag tag-invest">Invest</span></div>
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Build emergency fund of ${fmtINR(emergency)} (6 months expenses)</span><span class="sch-tag tag-save">Save</span></div>
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Get ₹50L term insurance (₹${income>50000?'800–1200':'400–700'}/month)</span><span class="sch-tag tag-save">Protect</span></div>
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Apply for Mudra Yojana if starting a business (up to ₹10L, no collateral)</span><span class="sch-tag tag-scheme">Govt Scheme</span></div>
    <div class="sch-row"><span>Check if eligible for Stand Up India (₹10L–1Cr for women entrepreneurs)</span><span class="sch-tag tag-scheme">Govt Scheme</span></div>`;
    }
    // ── CAREER ROADMAP ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const roadmaps = {
    fresher: {
    title: '🎓 Roadmap for Fresh Graduates',
    steps: [
    {title:'Build your foundation', desc:'Polish your resume, create a LinkedIn profile, and identify your core skills vs. market demand.',tags:['Resume','LinkedIn','Self-Assessment']},
    {title:'Target strategically', desc:'Apply to 3 types of companies: large (stability), mid-size (growth), startups (experience). Use Naukri, LinkedIn, Internshala.',tags:['Naukri','LinkedIn','Internshala']},
    {title:'Skill up in parallel', desc:'Get one industry certification in 60 days: Google Data Analytics, AWS Cloud Practitioner, Meta Social Media Marketing (all free/low cost).',tags:['Google Certs','NPTEL','Coursera']},
    {title:'Nail interviews', desc:'Practice STAR method for behavioural questions. Research salary ranges on Glassdoor/AmbitionBox before negotiating.',tags:['STAR Method','AmbitionBox','Mock Interviews']},
    {title:'Negotiate your offer', desc:'Never accept the first offer. Ask for 15–20% higher. Cite your skills and research. Most companies expect this.',tags:['Salary Negotiation','Benchmarking']},
    ]
    },
    mid: {
    title: '💼 Roadmap for Mid-Career Professionals',
    steps: [
    {title:'Audit your market value', desc:'Compare your salary on AmbitionBox, Glassdoor, and LinkedIn Salary. If you\'re >20% below market, it\'s time to act.',tags:['AmbitionBox','Benchmarking']},
    {title:'Build a negotiation case', desc:'Document achievements with numbers: "Increased team efficiency by 35%", "Managed ₹2Cr budget". Quantify everything.',tags:['Achievements','Data']},
    {title:'Expand your network', desc:'Connect with 5 senior professionals monthly. Attend industry events. Be visible — share insights on LinkedIn.',tags:['LinkedIn','Networking','Industry Events']},
    {title:'Seek stretch assignments', desc:'Volunteer for cross-functional projects. Visibility with senior leadership is key to promotions.',tags:['Leadership','Visibility','Cross-functional']},
    {title:'Consider parallel income', desc:'Freelancing on Toptal, Upwork, or consulting can supplement income while you explore options.',tags:['Freelancing','Toptal','Consulting']},
    ]
    },
    returner: {
    title: '🏠 Roadmap for Career Returners',
    steps: [
    {title:'Own your story', desc:'Your gap is NOT a weakness. Reframe it: "I managed household responsibilities while completing X certification." Employers value this honesty.',tags:['Confidence','Gap Reframing']},
    {title:'Update your skills (60 days)', desc:'Take one free course in your field. Google, Coursera, and NPTEL have excellent India-focused programs. This shows initiative.',tags:['NPTEL','Google','Coursera']},
    {title:'Start with returnship programs', desc:'TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Amazon India have structured returnship programs for women. These offer retraining + employment.',tags:['TCS Returnship','Infosys BPM','Amazon']},
    {title:'Rebuild your network', desc:'Reach out to former colleagues on LinkedIn. Be direct: "I\'m returning after a family-related break and exploring opportunities."',tags:['LinkedIn','Former Colleagues']},
    {title:'Start part-time / freelance first', desc:'Freelancing builds recent work experience for your resume. Platforms like Upwork, Toptal, and Fiverr work well.',tags:['Freelancing','Part-time','Fiverr']},
    ]
    },
    pivot: {
    title: '🔄 Roadmap for Career Pivoters',
    steps: [
    {title:'Identify transferable skills', desc:'List skills from your current role that apply to your target field (project management, communication, data analysis are universal).',tags:['Skills Audit','Transferable Skills']},
    {title:'Validate the target field', desc:'Informational interview 5 people in your target role. Understand day-to-day realities before committing.',tags:['Informational Interviews','Research']},
    {title:'Bridge the skill gap', desc:'Most pivots need 3–6 months of focused learning. Identify the 2–3 key skills that matter most in the new field.',tags:['Online Courses','Bootcamps','NPTEL']},
    {title:'Build a portfolio', desc:'Do 2–3 projects in the new field (freelance, volunteer, personal). This proves capability more than certificates.',tags:['Portfolio','Projects','GitHub']},
    {title:'Reposition your resume', desc:'Rewrite your resume for the new role, emphasising transferable skills. Use the language of the target industry in every line.',tags:['Resume Rewrite','Keywords','ATS']},
    ]
    }
    };
    function selectRoadmap(key, el) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.rm-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('selected'));
    el.classList.add('selected');
    const rm = roadmaps[key];
    document.getElementById('roadmap-title').textContent = rm.title;
    document.getElementById('roadmap-content').innerHTML = rm.steps.map((s,i)=>`
    <div class="rm-step">
    <div class="rm-step-num">${i+1}</div>
    <div class="rm-step-content">
    <h4>${s.title}</h4>
    <p>${s.desc}</p>
    <div class="tags">${s.tags.map(t=>`<span>${t}</span>`).join('')}</div>
    </div>
    </div>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('roadmap-steps').style.display='block';
    }
    // ── RESUME BUILDER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function updateResume() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value || 'Your Name';
    const title = document.getElementById('r-title').value || 'Your Title';
    const contact = [document.getElementById('r-contact').value, document.getElementById('r-location').value, document.getElementById('r-links').value].filter(Boolean).join(' | ');
    const summary = document.getElementById('r-summary').value || 'Your professional summary will appear here…';
    const job1 = document.getElementById('r-job1-title').value;
    const job1dates = document.getElementById('r-job1-dates').value;
    const job1bullets = (document.getElementById('r-job1-bullets').value||'').split('\n').filter(Boolean).map(b=>`<li>${b}</li>`).join('');
    const edu = document.getElementById('r-edu').value || 'Your education details';
    const skills = document.getElementById('r-skills').value || 'Your skills';
    document.getElementById('resume-doc').innerHTML = `
    <div class="rdoc-name">${name}</div>
    ${title?`<div style="font-size:13px;color:#555;margin-bottom:4px">${title}</div>`:''}
    <div class="rdoc-contact">${contact||'email@example.com | City, India'}</div>
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Summary</h3><p>${summary}</p></div>
    ${job1?`<div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Experience</h3><div class="rdoc-job-title">${job1}</div>${job1dates?`<div class="rdoc-job-meta">${job1dates}</div>`:''}${job1bullets?`<ul>${job1bullets}</ul>`:''}</div>`:''}
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Education</h3><p>${edu}</p></div>
    <div class="rdoc-section"><h3>Skills</h3><p>${skills}</p></div>
    `;
    }
    // ── MENTORSHIP ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function bookMentor(name) { showToast('Session request sent to ' + name + '! ✓'); }
    // ── GOVT SCHEMES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function filterScheme(cat, el) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.sfilter').forEach(f=>f.classList.remove('active'));
    el.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.scheme-card').forEach(c=>{
    c.style.display = (cat==='all'||c.dataset.cat.includes(cat)) ? 'block' : 'none';
    });
    }
    // ── TOAST ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function showToast(msg) {
    const t = document.getElementById('toast');
    t.textContent = msg; t.style.display='block';
    setTimeout(()=>t.style.display='none', 2800);
    }
    // Init
    updateResume();
    </script>
    </body>
    </html>
